title: Yaavum Poithaanaa Lyrics Aadhi Bhagavan Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yaavum Poithaanaa
Singers: Madhushree
Movie: Aadhi Bhagavan
Music: Yuvan
Lyrics : Snehan

Yaavum Poithaana ? kadhal thavira manmeley
nee en uyir thaana ? naanum pilaithaen unnaaley
kadhal unnodu karuvaanadhey
katril isai pola pariponadhey
idhuvarai idhu illai, edhuvarai idhan ellai
enakoru padhil solvaayadaa

unnkkaana mounathil enakaana varthayai
naan thaedi paarthathil
sugam kandaen kandaen naanthaanada

Puviengum idhayangal vazhkindra poadhilum
enakaana idhyamayaai unnai kandaen kandaen
naanthaanada

Yaavum Poithaana ? kadhal thavira manmeley
nee en uyir thaana ? naanum pilaithaen unnaaley

undhan urave podhum enaku anbae
undhan anaipal muchai niruthu anbae

konjam mayakkam konjam thayakkam
rendum kadhal thandha parisuthaan

konjam nerukkam konjam irakkam
rendum penmai ketkum parisuthaan

Aasi anaithum unnai nokiye poga
osai indriye vaarthai anaithum saaga

Thoongum vizhigalil thooral vilundhadhaal
thooram kuraigayil unnarkiren

Endha nadaigalil ada thiraigalai
vittu vilaginaan malargiren

unnkkaana mounathil enakaana varthayai
naan thaedi paarthathil
sugam kandaen kandaen naanthaanada

Puviengum idhayangal vazhkindra poadhilum
enakaana idhyamayaai unnai kandaen kandaen
naanthaanada

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yaavum Poithaanaa?

The song explores themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional connections and the pain of separation.

How does Yaavum Poithaanaa fit into the plot of Aadhi Bhagavan?

This song reflects the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic experiences throughout the movie.

Who is the singer and music director of Yaavum Poithaanaa?

The song is sung by Madhusree and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Yaavum Poithaanaa released?

The song was released on October 7, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaavum Poithaanaa, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for love, encapsulating the essence of romantic longing. The song's soothing melody, combined with poignant lyrics by Snehan, evokes a sense of nostalgia and heartache. It serves as a reflective moment in Aadhi Bhagavan, highlighting the emotional turmoil faced by the characters. The haunting vocals of Madhusree further amplify the song's impact, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaavum Poithaanaa from Aadhi Bhagavan is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Madhusree's enchanting vocals and Yuvan's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that perfectly blends lyrical poetry with haunting melodies.
stanzaMeanings: Is everything gone? Apart from love, are you my life? I have also lost you, love, like music in the wind. Until now, this is not it, and until now, this is the limit. Will you tell me an answer?
In your silence, I searched for words that belong to me, and in that search, I found happiness.
Even in the blooming hearts, I found you as my own, and in that search, I found happiness.
Is everything gone? Apart from love, are you my life? I have also lost you, love.
Your connection is enough for me, my dear. Stop your teasing, my dear.
A little confusion, a little clarity, both are pure love.
A little sharpness, a little softness, both are pure femininity.
All desires are directed towards you, without any sound, all words fade away.
In the sleeping eyes, if the dew falls, I will be far away from you.
In any path, I have let go of the obstacles and bloomed like a flower.
In your silence, I searched for words that belong to me, and in that search, I found happiness.
Even in the blooming hearts, I found you as my own, and in that search, I found happiness.
